title: Atlanta One Love Reggae Music Fest
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park (Birth of Atlanta Lot), Atlanta
description: Outdoor reggae festival with live bands, food vendors, and great vibes. Perfect for couples who love good music in the open air. Arrive early, bring a blanket, and enjoy the sunset vibes together.

title: Vegan Nights ATL: Taste the City
description: Atlanta's ultimate vegan food pop-up with multiple vendors, craft drinks, and DJ sets. A fun, different vibe for couples tired of the same dinner routine. Great photo ops and delicious food.

title: The Legends of Laughter
description: Multi-comedian showcase featuring veteran stand-up talent. A polished date night with guaranteed laughs. Pair it with dinner nearby for a full evening out.

title: Let's Go Dancing: Paintings by Anna Jensen
description: Gallery opening featuring dance-inspired paintings. The art explores movement and emotion — perfect conversation starter for couples. Intimate venue, wine available.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest
description: Two-day outdoor festival with live music, local beer, food vendors, and games. Great for couples who enjoy a laid-back festival atmosphere. Lots of space to wander and discover acts together.

title: ZO! & Tall Black Guy featuring Deborah Bond
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE
description: Smooth neo-soul and jazz fusion at City Winery. Deborah Bond's vocals over ZO! and Tall Black Guy's production creates an intimate, romantic atmosphere. Book a table, share wine, and enjoy the groove.

title: TRUTH - The Day Experience (April Edition)
description: Afrobeats and Amapiano day party. Good music, good crowd, good vibes — couples can dance or just enjoy the beat together. Dress cute, grab a drink, and let the rhythm take over.

title: Gordon Parks: The South in Color
description: Over 40 powerful photographs from Gordon Parks' iconic 1956 Civil Rights era series. Culturally rich, conversation-starting — great for an intimate, meaningful date. Very powerful imagery.

title: Open Studios at Atlanta Contemporary
description: Meet working artists in their studios. Unique, inspiring, and free. Wander through creative spaces together, talk to artists, and discover new perspectives. Great for curious couples.

title: David and Tamela Mann
description: The power couple of gospel and comedy perform live. Tamela's comedy mixed with David's music makes for an entertaining, feel-good show. Great for couples who enjoy gospel, R&B, and laughs.

title: Squids N Giggles Weekly Comedy
description: Weekly comedy show at Argosy with rotating comics. Fun, casual energy and cheap drinks make this a solid low-key date option. Show up early for good seats.

title: Mimosas with Brunch LIVE
description: Every 1st Sunday celebration with bubbly, brunch vibes, and live performances. Relaxed, social, and great for couples who want to ease into Sunday together.

title: Unbound Narratives: Embodied Language
description: Group exhibition exploring language through the body. Contemporary art that challenges and inspires — perfect for couples who appreciate modern art and deep conversations.

title: Atlanta Veg Week Kickoff
description: Kickoff party for Atlanta Veg Week at Patagonia'sstore. Meet the community, sample plant-based bites, learn about the week's events. Low-key, welcoming — great for foodie couples.
